theory.canonical_statement: ID4423 records Combo Holonomy Capacitance Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `0_Incoming\Manual_Uploads\TXT_20260224_182616\combo.txt` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \begin{align} C_1(T^2) &= \frac{1}{2\pi} \int_{T^2} F_{\mu\nu}\,\mathrm{d}^2x, \\ w(T^2) &= \frac{1}{2\pi i} \oint_{\partial T^2} \mathrm{d}\log \det T_{\mathrm{pack}\to T^2}, \\ \Pi_{\pi} &= \limsup_{n\to\infty} \prod_{k=1}^{n} \left( 1 + \frac{k_{\mathrm{kiss}}(s_k)}{10^k\,d_k(\pi)} \right)^{1/n}. \end{align}
